name: Message: Onboarding
description: Slack Block Kit Builder template — message / Onboarding

text.text:
Hey there 👋 I'm TaskBot. I'm here to help you create and manage tasks in Slack.
There are two ways to quickly create tasks:
*1️⃣ Use the `/task` command*. Type `/task` followed by a short description of your tasks and I'll ask for a due date (if applicable). Try it out by using the `/task` command in this channel.

*2️⃣ Use the _Create a Task_ action.* If you want to create a task from a message, select `Create a Task` in a message's context menu. Try it out by selecting the _Create a Task_ action for this message (shown below).

➕ To start tracking your team's tasks, *add me to a channel* and I'll introduce myself. I'm usually added to a team or project channel. Type `/invite @TaskBot` from the channel or pick a channel on the right.

elements.text:
👀 View all tasks with `/task list`
❓Get help at any time with `/task help` or type *help* in a DM with me

name: Message: Newsletter
description: Slack Block Kit Builder template — message / Newsletter

text.text: Replay our screening of *Threat Level Midnight* and pick up a copy of the DVD to give to your customers at the front desk.

The *2019 Dundies* happened. 
Awards were given, heroes were recognized. 
Check out *#dundies-2019* to see who won awards.
`11/20-11/22` *Beet the Competition* _ annual retreat at Schrute Farms_
:printer: *Sabre Printers* are no longer catching on fire! The newest version of our printers are safe to use. Make sure to tell your customers today.

Please join me in welcoming our 3 *new hires* to the Paper Company family! 

 *Robert California*, CEO 

 *Ryan Howard*, Temp 

 *Erin Hannon*, Receptionist

text.text: Please choose an option where you'd like to stay from Oct 21 - Oct 23 (2 nights).

*Airstream Suite*
*Share with another person*. Private walk-in bathroom. TV. Heating. Kitchen with microwave, basic cooking utensils, wine glasses and silverware.

*Redwood Suite*
*Share with 2 other person*. Studio home. Modern bathroom. TV. Heating. Full kitchen. Patio with lounge chairs and campfire style fire pit and grill.

*Luxury Tent*
*One person only*. Shared modern bathrooms and showers in lounge building. Temperature control with heated blankets. Lights and electrical outlets.
